name: Dusseldorf Chicken Schnitzel
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs chicken breast, split, boned, skinne
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten the chicken to 1/8 inch thickness.
2. In a bowl, mix flour and seasonings (salt, pepper).
3. Coat each piece of chicken in the flour mixture.
4. Dip the chicken in beaten eggs and water.
5. Coat the chicken again with bread crumbs and parmesan cheese.
6. Chill for at least 30 minutes.
7. Fry the chicken in margarine for 6 minutes or until cooked through, turning once.
8. Serve with lemon.
